rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Special Discovery (Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 13, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Turner Construction Company¿s motion to compel plaintiff to provide further responses to special interrogatories, requests for production and Judicial Council form interrogatories: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:00a.m. Due to the court¿s trial schedule all motion hearings must conclude no later than 9:25a.m. Defendant must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THEODORE WEBB et al VS. BALTIMORE ENNIS LAND CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production, To Compel Further Answers, And For Sanctions
